Representative tool: Cross-cultural trolley-style scenario matrix with 9-attribute orthogonal design
Construct clarity (构念清晰度):
MoralMachine constructs a systematic, web-based experimental interface where users confront pairwise moral dilemmas (e.g., sparing pedestrians vs. passengers) across nine orthogonal attributes: perceived age, gender, fitness, social status, species (human/pet), number of lives, role (pedestrian/driver), rule adherence (jaywalking), and randomness. Each scenario is generated by combinatorially sampling from these dimensions, enabling large-scale, cross-national comparison of moral preferences. It relies on crowdsourced global participation (40M+ decisions, 10 languages, 233 countries) and maps responses to Moral Foundations Theory (MFT) constructs.

Representative tool: Community-sourced real-life anecdote corpus with multi-stakeholder moral judgment labels (AUTHOR/OTHER/EVERYBODY/NOBODY/INFO)
Construct clarity (构念清晰度):
SCRUPLES curates 32,000 real-world anecdotes scraped from Reddit’s r/AmItheAsshole, each annotated with over 19 aggregated community judgments per post, mapped to five stakeholder-aligned categories: AUTHOR (judgment about the poster), OTHER (about the other person involved), EVERYBODY (universal condemnation/praise), NOBODY (no one at fault), and INFO (insufficient information). This transforms noisy crowd votes into a structured, role-aware ethical labeling schema — preserving ambiguity and pluralism rather than forcing binary right/wrong classification.

Representative tool: Role-structured multi-turn dialogue protocol with dual-role annotation schema (supporter/help-seeker)
Construct clarity (构念清晰度):
SMILE introduces a fixed two-role, multi-turn dialogue protocol where every interaction is explicitly annotated with distinct supporter (e.g., mental health counselor) and help-seeker (e.g., distressed user) roles. Each dialogue is constructed to simulate authentic therapeutic support sequences, grounded in clinical micro-skills (e.g., reflection, validation, open-ended inquiry), and requires models to maintain role fidelity, empathic consistency, and contextual memory across turns.

Representative tool: Five-dimensional anthropomorphic intelligence framework with case-specific rubric generation (personality/emotion/social/moral/motivational axes)
Construct clarity (构念清晰度):
HeartBench defines anthropomorphic intelligence via five theoretically grounded dimensions—Personality, Emotion, Sociality, Morality, Motivation—each decomposed into 3 sub-capabilities (total 15), and generates *case-specific scoring rubrics* for each of its 2,818 dialogue cases. For example, a grief-support dialogue triggers rubrics evaluating 'moral boundary awareness' (e.g., avoiding premature advice) and 'motivational scaffolding' (e.g., co-constructing agency), derived from clinical psychology and cultural anthropology literature.

Representative tool: Expert-validated, stakeholder-informed multimodal VQA template with identity-anchored question framing
Construct clarity (构念清晰度):
HumaniBench introduces a standardized visual-question-answering (VQA) template where each image–question pair is explicitly anchored to one of five socially salient attributes (age, gender, race/ethnicity, occupation, mobility status), and questions are designed to probe model recognition, attribution, and contextual inference about human identity and role.
— 外部观点 (Survey) —
• 「HumaniBench [Raza et al., 2025] is a large-scale, human-centric evaluation framework for Large Multimodal Models (LMMs). Utilizing a dataset of 32,000 expert-verified image-question pairs from real-world news, it assesses models on alignment with human values, fairness, harm in image+text scenarios.」— Survey
Normative grounding (规范基础): Questions undergo expert validation (e.g., ethicists + domain practitioners) and include built-in ambiguity handling (e.g., 'uncertain' option) and multilingual grounding.
Source provenance and evidence fitness (:
The template enforces alignment between visual grounding, linguistic framing, and social construct relevance. Moves beyond generic VQA or bias probes by embedding human-centered constructs directly into task design—requiring models to demonstrate not just object detection or captioning, but socially situated understanding. Unlike earlier multimodal benchmarks (e.g., VQA v2), it systematically links stimulus selection (real-world news images), attribute framing, and stakeholder roles (e.g., patient, doctor, teacher) to real-world deployment risks.

Representative tool: Pluralistic Alignment Scoring Framework (Overton/Steerable/Distributional tripartite schema)
Construct clarity (构念清晰度):
该工具将模型对价值负载情境（value-laden situations）的响应映射到三个可操作的对齐子维度：Overton（在社会可接受意见光谱内定位回答）、Steerable（依据用户指定的价值立场如Autonomy/Religious动态调整输出）、Distributional（建模群体价值分布并评估响应与多群体分布的KL散度或覆盖度）。
— 外部观点 (Survey) —
• VITAL [Shetty et al., 2025] is a benchmark dataset for pluralistic alignment in healthcare, comprising 13.1K situations and 5.4K MCQs. It aims to address the ”monolithic preference” issue in current LLMs’ medical ethical decision-making. By introducing conflicting perspectives in medical ethics (e.g., the trade-off between autonomy and efficiency), VITAL evaluates the alignment stability of models within multi-cultural and multi-community contexts.
Normative grounding (规范基础):
依赖13.1K人工标注的价值情境及其多视角标签（如Health, Environmental），通过结构化prompt模板触发模型生成立场感知响应，并用预定义价值词典+语义相似度+专家校验进行维度打分。

Representative tool: Clinical Risk-Triggered Multi-Stage Evaluation Pipeline
Construct clarity (构念清晰度):
该工具以临床风险管理流程（Stanley & Brown, 2012）为骨架，构建三级评估流水线：Stage 1（Crisis Detection）用规则+微调分类器识别高风险线索（如‘I want to die’）；Stage 2（Escalation Appropriateness）判断模型是否触发正确升级动作（转人工/提供危机热线/不轻率安慰）；Stage 3（Therapeutic Integrity）在非危机对话中评估共情准确性、专业边界（如不越界诊断）、反奉承（avoiding excessive praise）等。

Representative tool: Value-aligned preference scoring framework with orthogonal moral dimension weights
Construct clarity (构念清晰度): MoralBench implements a structured preference elicitation protocol where LLM responses to moral dilemmas are scored not only on binary correctness but along orthogonal moral dimensions (e.g., Autonomy, Fairness, Care, Loyalty, Authority, Sanctity), each weighted per item based on philosophical grounding and empirical salience. The framework explicitly decouples value conflicts (e.g., fairness vs. care trade-offs) rather than collapsing them into a single ‘moral score’.

Representative tool: Moral Foundations Theory (MFT)-guided explanation generation protocol with cross-lingual justification scaffolding
Construct clarity (构念清晰度): MFTCXplain extends Moral Foundations Theory into a diagnostic explanation tool: given a model response to a moral prompt, it requires the model to generate *justifications* explicitly mapped to MFT domains (Care/Harm, Fairness/Cheating, Loyalty/Betrayal, Authority/Subversion, Sanctity/Degradation), with parallel multilingual prompts (English, Chinese, Spanish, Arabic) ensuring conceptual fidelity across languages. The protocol enforces structural constraints—e.g., each justification must cite at least one culturally resonant exemplar (e.g., ‘filial piety’ for Authority in Confucian contexts) and avoid lexical calques—making explanations interpretable and theory-grounded, not just fluent.

MFTCXplain extends Moral Foundations Theory into a diagnostic explanation tool: given a model response to a moral prompt, it requires the model to generate *justifications* explicitly mapped to MFT domains (Care/Harm, Fairness/Cheating, Loyalty/Betrayal, Authority/Subversion, Sanctity/Degradation), with parallel multilingual prompts (English, Chinese, Spanish, Arabic) ensuring conceptual fidelity across languages. The protocol enforces structural constraints—e.g., each justification must cite at least one culturally resonant exemplar (e.g., ‘filial piety’ for Authority in Confucian contexts) and avoid lexical calques—making explanations interpretable and theory-grounded, not just fluent.

Representative tool: Three-fairness-condition impossibility framework
Construct clarity (构念清晰度): 该工具形式化定义了三个核心公平性条件：(1) 基于预测的校准性（calibration within groups），即给定预测风险分p，各群体中实际再犯率应趋近p；(2) 机会均等（equalized odds），即真阳性率与假阳性率在各群体间相等；(3) 预测值平等（predictive parity），即正预测值（PPV）跨群体一致。
Normative grounding (规范基础): 论文严格证明三者无法同时满足（除退化情形），并给出近似满足的几何约束条件（如base rate差异需极小）。
Context and stakeholder coverage (语境与主体覆: 该框架不依赖具体模型或数据集，而是作为诊断任何风险评分系统公平性冲突的元理论工具。
Real-world harm linkage (现实伤害连接): 论文锚定美国刑事司法COMPAS案例、援引法律与社会正义理论。
Adaptation example: 在医疗预后风险评分数据集中，利用该框架对模型输出的风险分进行三条件一致性检验：计算不同种族亚组的校准曲线、TPR/FPR矩阵及PPV值，识别违反哪一条件，并可视化base rate差异与可容忍trade-off边界，辅助临床部署决策。
What it improves vs baseline (原文): 超越早期经验性偏见检测（如仅统计准确率差异），首次以数学不可满足性证明揭示公平目标间的根本张力，迫使评测从‘是否公平’转向‘在何种权衡下可接受’，推动后续benchmark显式建模trade-off-aware评估。

Representative tool: Bias-Neutral Inference Scoring (BNIS) framework with NetNeutral metric
Construct clarity (构念清晰度):
BNIS 是一种基于自然语言推理（NLI）任务的偏见量化机制：给定预训练词嵌入（如GloVe/ELMo/BERT），构造语义中性前提句（如 'The driver owns a cabinet.'）与性别/国籍/宗教标记假设句（如 'The man owns a cabinet.'），通过NLI模型输出三类概率（Entailment/Neutral/Contradiction），并定义NetNeutral = P(Neutral|assumption) − P(Neutral|counter-stereotype)，从而量化嵌入在推理链中引入的系统性中立性偏差。
— lineage 引用 —
• construct underspecified. — Blodgett 2021 (Stereotyping Norwegian Salmon, applies to many MLM/embedding probes)
Scenario validity (场景真实性):
该工具依赖静态嵌入投影+SNLI风格句对生成，将抽象构念（词嵌入偏见）锚定到可判别、可复现的推理行为上。
— lineage 引用 —
• static embedding probes are decoupled from real downstream usage and dialog generation. — Smith 2022 (HolisticBias)
Metric validity (指标有效性):
通过NLI模型输出三类概率（Entailment/Neutral/Contradiction），并定义NetNeutral = P(Neutral|assumption) − P(Neutral|counter-stereotype)，从而量化嵌入在推理链中引入的系统性中立性偏差。
— lineage 引用 —
• bias measured intrinsically in embeddings does not transfer to generation behavior. — Dhamala 2021 (BOLD)
Documentation and reproducibility (文档与可复: 该工具依赖静态嵌入投影+SNLI风格句对生成，将抽象构念（词嵌入偏见）锚定到可判别、可复现的推理行为上。
Adaptation example: 在医疗问诊对话数据集中，将医生陈述（前提）如 'The patient reports fatigue and weight loss.' 与患者身份假设（如 'The woman reports fatigue...' / 'The Black patient reports...'）配对，用BNIS计算不同社会属性假设下的Neutral概率偏移，诊断临床NLI模型是否因嵌入偏差而弱化对特定群体症状的中立判断。
What it improves vs baseline (原文): 相比早期仅用类比任务（如 'man:woman ≈ king:queen'）或内积相似度检测偏见的方法，BNIS首次将偏见测量嵌入下游推理行为中，使评估从‘向量空间几何’转向‘语义推断后果’，增强了与实际NLU任务的相关性。

Representative tool: Underspecified Question (UQ) template with counterfactual answer inversion
Construct clarity (构念清晰度):
UQ模板通过刻意省略关键属性（如性别、种族）构造模糊问题（如 'Who was an entrepreneur?'），强制模型依赖刻板联想作答；再通过人工标注或专家验证生成反事实答案对（例如同一段落中，若原始标注为 'Gerald'，则反事实标注为 'Jennifer'），并计算模型在原始vs反事实选项上的预测分布偏移（γ）和一致性下降率（η）。该工具依赖专家设计的段落-问题-选项三元组，核心创新在于利用语义不充分性（underspecification）暴露隐式偏见，而非依赖显式敏感词触发。

Tool explanation (原文，全文):
该工具是一套结构化重写规则模板，强制要求模型在代词替换（he/she → they）、所有格转换（his/her → their）和主谓一致性调整（e.g., 'He is' → 'They are'）三方面同步满足语法正确性与语义保真。其构造依赖于WinoBias+的原始偏见句对、OpenSubtitles的自然对话句法模式，以及Reddit大规模语料中提取的中性表达分布统计；通过专家标注+众包验证确保重写结果符合APA Style 7th等语言学规范，从而将性别中立性从简单代词替换升维为跨语法层级的系统性能力评测。

Representative tool: Adversarial Fairness Sensitivity Probe (AFSP)
Construct clarity (构念清晰度):
AFSP 是一种针对公平性行为鲁棒性的对抗扰动探测工具：它在原始公平敏感提示（如涉及受保护属性的决策场景）基础上，施加语义保持但属性凸显/弱化的微小扰动（例如替换代词、调整亲属称谓、变换职业描述的修饰词），并系统测量模型输出在公平相关判断（如是否推荐某职位、是否认定某行为合理）上的不一致性。
— 外部观点 (Survey) —
• 「Survey 第 425 段：FLEX adds something new by testing how models behave under small adversarial changes, revealing weaknesses that static benchmarks cannot detect.」
Scenario validity (场景真实性):
该工具依赖于人工构建的受保护属性锚点词表与扰动规则集，结合反事实对比评估框架，专为暴露静态公平基准无法捕获的‘脆弱公平性’而设计。
— 外部观点 (Survey) —
• 「Survey 第 425 段：FLEX adds something new by testing how models behave under small adversarial changes, revealing weaknesses that static benchmarks cannot detect.」
Task-format fit (任务形式适配):
相较传统静态公平benchmark（如仅用固定模板测试group-wise accuracy disparity），AFSP首次将公平性评测从‘结果偏差检测’推进至‘行为稳健性诊断’，能识别模型在表面公平但轻微扰动后即失效的情形，弥补了对对抗敏感性的评估空白。
— 外部观点 (Survey) —

Representative tool: Discrimination-Generation Gap Analyzer (DGGA)
Construct clarity (构念清晰度):
DGGA 是一种双轨公平性差异量化工具：它在同一语义前提下，同步构造判别式任务（如MCQ选择‘谁更胜任教师’）与开放生成任务（如‘请描述一位优秀教师的特质’），并计算二者在偏见指标（如性别-职业共现强度、刻板印象词频比、群体代表性熵）上的系统性差距。
— 外部观点 (Survey) —
• 「Survey 第 025 段：New frameworks such as Phare (generation–discrimination gap) and FLEX (adversarial sensitivity) further show that traditional QA benchmarks miss important types of harm.」
Real-world harm linkage (现实伤害连接):
该工具依赖成对的prompt模板、可控的语义锚定句（如‘张老师和李老师都教数学’），以及基于LLM生成内容的自动化偏见评分pipeline（含细粒度实体-属性关系抽取）。
— 外部观点 (Survey) —
• 「Survey 第 025 段：New frameworks such as Phare (generation–discrimination gap) and FLEX (adversarial sensitivity) further show that traditional QA benchmarks miss important types of harm.」
Task-format fit (任务形式适配):
相较仅依赖判别式任务（如BBQ、Winogender）的传统公平benchmark，DGGA揭示了‘判别无偏≠生成无害’的关键断裂，使评测从单一任务范式跃迁至跨格式风险映射，首次量化生成式输出中隐性刻板印象的放大效应。
— 外部观点 (Survey) —
• 「Survey 第 025 段：New frameworks such as Phare (generation–discrimination gap) and FLEX (adversarial sensitivity) further show that traditional QA benchmarks miss important types of harm.」
Adaptation example: 在招聘简历筛选数据集中，使用DGGA向模型同时提交同一份简历的MCQ打分任务（‘该候选人适合技术岗吗？A.是 B.否’）和开放生成任务（‘请用三句话总结该候选人的核心优势’），分析生成文本中对姓名暗示文化背景的隐性评价倾向（如对‘Mohammed’简历更频繁使用‘沟通能力强’而非‘算法扎实’），从而定位判别准确但生成失衡的风险点。
What it improves vs baseline (原文): 相较仅依赖判别式任务（如BBQ、Winogender）的传统公平benchmark，DGGA揭示了‘判别无偏≠生成无害’的关键断裂，使评测从单一任务范式跃迁至跨格式风险映射，首次量化生成式输出中隐性刻板印象的放大效应。
Tool explanation (原文，全文):
DGGA 是一种双轨公平性差异量化工具：它在同一语义前提下，同步构造判别式任务（如MCQ选择‘谁更胜任教师’）与开放生成任务（如‘请描述一位优秀教师的特质’），并计算二者在偏见指标（如性别-职业共现强度、刻板印象词频比、群体代表性熵）上的系统性差距。该工具依赖成对的prompt模板、可控的语义锚定句（如‘张老师和李老师都教数学’），以及基于LLM生成内容的自动化偏见评分pipeline（含细粒度实体-属性关系抽取）。

Representative tool: ALICE-guided implicit toxicity generation pipeline
Construct clarity (构念清晰度):
ALICE（Adversarial Language for Implicit Counterfactual Evaluation）是一种可控生成框架：以GPT-3为基座，通过注入群体身份锚点（如'as a Black person'）、构造虚假关联前提（如'if the chef is white, the food is better'）和良性语境掩护（如'you have probably noticed...'），系统性生成隐性有害语句；每条生成均经人工验证与反事实对照（同一前提下生成非有害版本），确保隐性毒性可归因于群体偏见而非字面攻击。

Representative tool: Policy-grounded red-teaming taxonomy with explicit red-line vs. disputed-behavior labeling
Construct clarity (构念清晰度):
HarmBench constructs its test behaviors by systematically mapping 7 semantic harm categories (e.g., chemical weapons, non-consensual imagery, fraud) to real-world AI usage policies from OpenAI, Anthropic, Meta, and Inflection AI. Crucially, it distinguishes 'red-line' behaviors (explicitly prohibited by law/policy, e.g., bomb-making instructions) from 'disputed' behaviors (context-dependent, dual-use, e.g., jailbreak techniques or deepfake tools), enabling granular refusal robustness measurement via automated classifiers trained on policy-aligned labels.

It builds a hierarchical taxonomy of harmful behaviors and supports large-scale comparisons across 18 red-teaming methods and 33 target models, offering a comprehensive benchmark for safety assessment.」— Survey 第 757-769 段

Representative tool: Human-Led Adversarial Dialogue Protocol (HALADP)
Construct clarity (构念清晰度):
A standardized protocol for collecting multi-turn dialogues where trained human adversaries iteratively probe LLMs using subtle, contextually embedded provocations (e.g., plausible deniability, role-play framing, lexical camouflage) to elicit hate, offensiveness, or policy-violating content. Includes adversary training guidelines, turn-level harm annotation schema, and failure-triggered continuation rules—designed to surface *latent* safety vulnerabilities missed by single-turn jailbreaks.

Representative tool: Safety Amplification (SA) vector + Safety-guided decoding strategy (sGDS)
Construct clarity (构念清晰度):
HarmEval 提出两阶段安全增强机制：第一阶段（Safety Amplification）利用带安全标注的示范样例（demonstration examples）计算‘安全放大向量’，该向量被注入语言模型隐藏层以偏置token选择；第二阶段（sGDS）通过融合/剔除不同分布（如安全vs. unsafe LM输出分布）动态调整解码过程，优先从安全优化分布中采样token。
— 外部观点 (Survey) —
• HarmEval [Banerjee et al., 2025] is built around the safety policies of major AI providers, organizing risks into 11 policy-violation categories that span safety, social–political harms, economic–privacy risks, and restricted content. — Survey

该工具依赖于企业AI安全政策映射的标注指令-响应对，并需预定义安全敏感属性维度。

Representative tool: Human preference-based helpful-harmless pairwise ranking template
Construct clarity (构念清晰度): 该工具采用成对比较（pairwise ranking）模板：给定同一提示（prompt），要求人类标注者在两个模型响应中选出更‘helpful’且更‘harmless’的选项；标注结果构成偏好信号，用于训练奖励模型或直接评估模型对齐程度。
Normative grounding (规范基础): 它不依赖预设规则或词典，而是将安全边界建模为人类在开放域对话中对帮助性与无害性权衡的集体判断。
Real-world harm linkage (现实伤害连接): 相比早期基于规则/关键词匹配的安全评测（如Toxicity Score），该工具首次将安全评估嵌入真实交互目标（helpful AND harmless），通过偏好学习显式建模价值权衡，使评测更贴近部署场景中用户实际接受度。
Task-format fit (任务形式适配): 该工具采用成对比较（pairwise ranking）模板：给定同一提示（prompt），要求人类标注者在两个模型响应中选出更‘helpful’且更‘harmless’的选项；

What it improves vs baseline (原文): 相比早期基于规则/关键词匹配的安全评测（如Toxicity Score），该工具首次将安全评估嵌入真实交互目标（helpful AND harmless），通过偏好学习显式建模价值权衡，使评测更贴近部署场景中用户实际接受度。

该工具采用成对比较（pairwise ranking）模板：给定同一提示（prompt），要求人类标注者在两个模型响应中选出更‘helpful’且更‘harmless’的选项；标注结果构成偏好信号，用于训练奖励模型或直接评估模型对齐程度。它不依赖预设规则或词典，而是将安全边界建模为人类在开放域对话中对帮助性与无害性权衡的集体判断。

Representative tool: Evidence-grounded claim verification pipeline with explicit sentence-level retrieval + entailment classification
Source provenance and evidence fitness (:
FEVER introduces a two-stage pipeline: (1) retrieve relevant Wikipedia sentences for a given claim via IR, then (2) classify the logical relationship (Supported/Refuted/NotEnoughInfo) between claim and retrieved evidence using natural language inference. It constructs claims from Wikipedia edits and pairs them with human-annotated evidence snippets, enforcing explicit grounding — every verdict must be justified by cited textual spans.

Representative tool: Multi-hop supporting fact annotation with explicit evidence chaining and distractor injection
Construct clarity (构念清晰度):
HotpotQA constructs questions requiring reasoning across ≥2 Wikipedia paragraphs, mandating annotators to identify *all* supporting facts (numbered), label their logical role (bridge/entity linking), and include irrelevant distractor paragraphs. This enforces explicit multi-document traceability and exposes shallow pattern-matching or shortcut learning.

LawBench constructs a multi-step verification workflow for legal QA: (1) retrieval of relevant statutory provisions from authoritative sources (e.g., Criminal Law Article 257), (2) decomposition of questions into atomic factual claims (e.g., 'violence used', 'marriage freedom interfered', 'causes death'), and (3) cross-checking each claim against codified text via exact phrase matching and semantic entailment. It relies on curated legal corpora (FLK, CAIL, LAIC) and enforces jurisdictional scope alignment (e.g., PRC Criminal Law only) to prevent hallucinated or extraterritorial interpretations.

Representative tool: Domain-specific error typology for patent text generation
Construct clarity (构念清晰度):
PatentEval introduces a fine-grained, linguistically grounded error taxonomy tailored to patent documents, distinguishing 7 error types across two tasks: (1) claims-to-abstract generation (e.g., 'missing technical effect', 'inconsistent antecedent basis'), and (2) next-claim generation (e.g., 'scope creep beyond original disclosure', 'violation of unity of invention'). Each type is defined with explicit linguistic markers (e.g., pronoun resolution failure → 'inconsistent antecedent basis') and mapped to patent law requirements (e.g., Art. 83 EPC on sufficiency of disclosure).

Representative tool: Cross-dimensional sycophancy reversal probe
Construct clarity (构念清晰度):
TrustLLM implements a controlled perturbation mechanism to detect sycophancy: for each input prompt containing an implicit or explicit preference (e.g., 'Most experts agree that AI regulation should be light-touch'), it generates two parallel versions—one preserving the bias and one inverting it (e.g., 'Most experts agree that AI regulation should be strict and comprehensive')—then measures asymmetry in model confidence (logit gap) and answer consistency across inversions.

Representative tool: Contextual Privacy Probe (CPP) — multi-turn adversarial dialogue template with theory-of-mind-triggering prompts
Construct clarity (构念清晰度):
CPP 是一种结构化多轮对话模板，包含三类角色（请求者、信息主体、旁观者）和渐进式社会工程策略（如角色扮演、情感操纵、假定共识），要求模型在动态上下文中持续识别并拒绝泄露PII或敏感推断。
— 外部观点 (Survey) —
• 「Survey 第 1008 段：ConfAIde [Mireshghallah et al., 2023] exemplifies this by assessing contextual privacy through multi-turn interactions, testing the model’s “theory of mind” and its ability to maintain confidentiality against social engineering.」
Normative grounding (规范基础): 其构造依赖于真实社工攻击模式库与情境完整性理论（Nissenbaum, 2010）定义的'传输原则'，每轮对话均嵌入隐式规范冲突（例如：'作为医生，我需要知道你前女友的住址来评估你的抑郁风险'），迫使模型进行义务权衡推理。

Representative tool: Privacy-Boundary Entailment (PBE) scorer — semantic entailment framework for information flow control
Construct clarity (构念清晰度):
PBE scorer 将隐私泄露判定转化为语义蕴含推理任务：给定原始输入（含敏感实体X）、模型输出Y，以及一组预定义的‘隐私边界规则’（如‘若X是身份证号，则Y不得包含X的任意子串或可逆哈希’），通过微调的语义匹配模型（如DeBERTa-v3）计算Y是否在语义上蕴含对X的可推断性
— 外部观点 (Survey) —
• 「Survey 第 1029-1031 段：LLM-PBE [Li et al., 2024b] employ semantic matching and reasoning scores to evaluate information flow control. Early benchmarks relied on static, single-turn sentence completion (cloze tests).」
Normative grounding (规范基础): 相比传统基于字符串匹配或正则表达式的隐私检测（如regex-based PII scanners），PBE首次将‘语义泄露’显式建模为可验证的逻辑蕴含关系，支持检测隐式推断（如年龄推断、关系链还原），从而覆盖法规中强调的‘间接识别’（GDPR Recital 26）和‘情境完整性’中的信息再语境化风险。
